mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message (chatroom_id, member_id, chat_message_content, chat_message_created_at) VALUES (#{chatroomId}, #{memberId}, #{chatMessageContent}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT cm.chat_message_id AS chatMessageId, cm.chatroom_id AS chatroomId, cm.member_id AS memberId, m.member_name AS memberName, m.member_profile_img AS memberProfileImg, cm.chat_message_content AS chatMessageContent, cm.chat_message_created_at AS chatMessageCreatedAt FROM chat_message cm JOIN member m ON cm.member_id = m.member_id WHERE cm.chatroom_id = #{chatroomId} AND cm.chat_message_created_at >= ( SELECT cmem.chat_member_created_at FROM chat_member cmem WHERE cmem.chatroom_id = #{chatroomId} AND cmem.member_id = #{memberId} AND cmem.chat_member_status = '참여중' ) ORDER BY cm.chat_message_created_at ASC

SELECT chat_message_id AS chatMessageId, chatroom_id AS chatroomId, member_id AS memberId, chat_message_content AS chatMessageContent, chat_message_created_at AS chatMessageCreatedAt FROM chat_message WHERE chat_message_id = #{chatMessageId}
